_notes: Source: iit-proj-condition (clinical research, eligibility/AE tracking). Target: hemas-condition (hospital diagnosis). Source requires verificationStatus[1..1], mandatory LOINC onset, bans recorder, and uses research-specific category slices. Target relaxes verificationStatus min, makes encounter mandatory, lifts recorder ban, and uses hospital-specific category slices (admissionDiagnosis, dischargeDiagnosis). ICD-10 coding goes from optional to mandatory.

drifts.description: Source constraints removed: [iit-con-1 (error: ICD-10 or SNOMED code required), iit-con-2 (error: inclusion-criteria category implies confirmed verificationStatus)]. Not present in hemas-condition.
New error constraint added in target: hemas-con-1 (error: code.coding must exist). Source has no equivalent root constraint.
New warning constraint added in target: hemas-con-2 (warning: confirmed verificationStatus implies onset must exist). Source has no equivalent constraint.
Optional extension studyRelevance[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Optional extension protocolCriterion[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Optional extension adverseEventLink[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
New optional extension hospitalDepartment[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
New optional extension icdBlock[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
New optional extension chronicity[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.

verificationStatus cardinality relaxed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=true] (hemas no explicit min, inherits R4 base [0..1]). Min decreased. MustSupport and binding preserved.

Source category slices removed in target: [inclusionCriteria[0..1 mustSupport=true], adverseEvent[0..1 mustSupport=true], comorbidity[0..1 mustSupport=true]] all use IIT-specific code systems and are absent from hemas-condition.

New mustSupport=true category slices added in target: [admissionDiagnosis[0..1 mustSupport=true patternCC(encounter-diagnosis)], dischargeDiagnosis[0..1 mustSupport=true patternCC(hemas-discharge-diagnosis)]]. Source has no equivalent slices.
New binding added on Condition.code in target: extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/condition-code). Source has no binding on the code element itself.
code.coding:icd10 min cardinality strictly increased: source [0..1 mustSupport=true] → target [1..1 mustSupport=true]. ICD-10 coding is now mandatory in hemas.
Source code.coding:meddra[0..1 mustSupport=true patternCoding(system=http://www.meddra.org)] slice removed in target. Hemas condition does not define a MedDRA coding slice.
New code.text[mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not constrain code.text. Optional element in R4 base; MS added.
New binding added on bodySite in target: extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/body-site). Source has bodySite[mustSupport=true] with no binding. New binding added in target.

encounter min cardinality strictly increased: source [0..1 mustSupport=true] (R4 base min=0, no explicit min in source differential) → target [1..1 mustSupport=true]. Encounter is now mandatory in hemas condition.
onset[x] cardinality relaxed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=true] (hemas no explicit min, inherits R4 base [0..1]). Min decreased.
onset[x] types narrowed: source [dateTime, Age, Period] → target [dateTime, Period]. 'Age' type removed in hemas-condition.
abatement[x] types narrowed: source [dateTime, Age, Period] → target [dateTime, Period]. 'Age' type removed in hemas-condition.

recorder ban lifted and MustSupport added: source [0..0] (completely banned) → target [0..1 mustSupport=true] (hemas no explicit min, inherits R4 base [0..1]). Ban removed; MS added on optional element.
New stage[mustSupport=true] and stage.summary[mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not constrain stage. Optional element in R4 base; MS added.
